title: session_epoch-reset-orphan-hotfix — C4 model
description: Component-level view: two surgical patch sites in the session runtime container. No external surface or schema change.

systems.name: OpenCode runtime
systems.description: Single-process bun daemon hosting session runloop, message persistence, rebind-epoch registry, and runtime-event service.

containers.name: Session runtime
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/* — owns persistUserMessage, RebindEpoch, MessageV2 stream, runloop.

components.name: persistUserMessage
components.description: user-message-persist.ts — entry point for user-msg writes. Patched to call reclaimOrphanAssistant before existing chain.

components.name: reclaimOrphanAssistant
components.description: New helper: scans latest message via MessageV2.stream, finalizes orphan, emits workflow event.

components.name: RebindEpoch
components.description: rebind-epoch.ts — patched to track everBumped Set and emit unexpected-reset anomaly.

relationships.description: Inline call before existing Plugin.trigger / Session.updateMessage chain
Emits session.rebind_epoch_unexpected_reset (anomaly) in addition to existing session.rebind
